---
title: "Poeții Noștri"
subtitle: "Marea poezie a lumii — pusă pe muzică și imagine"
page-layout: full
anchor-sections: false
---

::: {.poetii-hero}
# 📜 Poeții Noștri
Marea poezie a lumii — românească și universală — recitată spoken-word peste imagine și sunet.<br>
**12** poeme publicate · interpretare Doctor Shrink
:::

::: {.poem-grid}
<a class="poem-card" href="a-e-baconsky-batran-si-singur.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">singuratate</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Bătrân și singur</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">A. E. Baconsky</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="a-e-baconsky-vara-tarzie.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">caldura</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Vara târzie</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">A. E. Baconsky</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adam-mickiewicz-ganduri-de-ziua-plecarii.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">drum</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Gânduri de ziua plecării</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adam Mickiewicz</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adam-puslojic-bucurie.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">fericire</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Bucurie</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adam Puslojić</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adam-puslojic-mor-pe-drum.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">drum</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Mor pe drum</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adam Puslojić</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adam-puslojic-un-edict-nou-fratilor-mei-romani.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">frate</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Un edict nou: fraţilor mei români</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adam Puslojić</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adrian-paunescu-a-venit-aseara-mama.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">mama</span>
  <span class="poem-title">A venit aseară mama</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adrian Păunescu</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adrian-paunescu-aceeasi-floare.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">flori</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Aceeași floare</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adrian Păunescu</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adrian-paunescu-adio-mama-patrie-adio.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">tara</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Adio, mamă patrie, adio!</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adrian Păunescu</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adrian-paunescu-adio-vara.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">caldura</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Adio, vară</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adrian Păunescu</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adrian-paunescu-agresiva-amintire.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">amintire</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Agresiva amintire</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adrian Păunescu</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
<a class="poem-card" href="adrian-paunescu-biet-nemuritor-la-zidul-mortii.html">
  <span class="poem-theme">moarte</span>
  <span class="poem-title">Biet nemuritor la zidul mortii</span>
  <span class="poem-poet">Adrian Păunescu</span>
  <span class="poem-cta">▶️ Ascultă</span>
</a>
:::

```{=html}
<style>
.poetii-hero {
  text-align:center; padding: clamp(2rem,5vw,4rem) 1rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0f1419 0%,#1e3a8a 30%,#7c3aed 70%,#ec4899 100%);
  color:#fff; border-radius:0 0 18px 18px; margin-bottom:2rem;
}
.poetii-hero h1 { color:#fff; border:none; }
.poem-grid {
  display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));
  gap:1.25rem; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 1rem 3rem;
}
.poem-card {
  display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:.4rem; padding:1.25rem 1.4rem;
  background:#242b3d; border:1px solid #3c4043; border-radius:14px;
  text-decoration:none; transition:all .25s ease;
}
.poem-card:hover {
  transform:translateY(-4px); border-color:#4f9cf9;
  box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(79,156,249,.2);
}
.poem-theme {
  align-self:flex-start; font-size:.72rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.05em;
  color:#fff; background:rgba(79,156,249,.9); padding:.18rem .6rem; border-radius:12px;
}
.poem-title { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:700; color:#fff; line-height:1.3; }
.poem-poet { font-size:.95rem; color:#9aa0a6; font-style:italic; }
.poem-cta {
  margin-top:.5rem; font-size:.9rem; font-weight:600;
  background:linear-gradient(45deg,#4f9cf9,#e879f9);
  -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text;
}
</style>
```
